mission_10: WITH customer_spend AS (SELECT c.region, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY c.region, c.name), ranked AS (SELECT region, name, total_spend, SUM(total_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY region) AS region_total FROM customer_spend) SELECT region, name, total_spend, ROUND((total_spend * 100.0) / region_total, 2) AS pct_contribution FROM ranked ORDER BY region, total_spend DESC;
